summary: Yt Build Stability component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「提升自己的稳定度」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-build-stability/src/YtBuildStability.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtBuildStability` and `ytBuildStabilityDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Build Stability Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-build-stability to my project. Preserve the exported YtBuildStabilityProps API and register the YtBuildStability composition with the default props.
